mission.title: Stage 1 - Figthus core conversion
mission.objective: Convert the fork into an installable Figthus Codex Skill with coherent package name, skill behavior, references, public docs, attribution, and QA checks for Stage 1 issues #1-#6.

acceptance_evidence.description: Installable skill package is renamed to figthus and invocation uses $figthus.
